allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@192.168.1.138 "docker ps -a --filter name=claude-conductor --format 'table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Image}}'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.138 "docker inspect claude-conductor --format '{{.Config.Image}} | {{.Image}} | {{.State.ExitCode}} | {{.State.Error}}' && docker image inspect ghcr.io/al-how/claude-conductor:latest --format '{{index .Config.Labels \\"org.opencontainers.image.revision\\"}} | created {{.Created}}' 2>&1 | head -5")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.138 "docker inspect claude-conductor --format '{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}} -> {{.Destination}}{{println}}{{end}}' | grep -i config")
